title: Constellation Brands is in the midst of a transformation. How activist Elliott may build value
text: A key change is going on at Constellation Brands, which has agreed to work with Elliott and add two seats to the board of directors.

title: S&P 500 Gains and Losses Today: Stocks Rally on Solid Earnings News
text: The S&P 500 rose 0.2% on Wednesday, July 19, 2023 as the market rally continued to be fueled by solid earnings reports.

title: Corona parent Constellation Brands shares on pace for record as big investor deepens its involvement to make it less of a family-controlled company
text: Shares of Constellation Brands Inc. were on track to hit a record high, a day after a large investor took steps to wield greater influence over the beer and wine maker's board — a move Wall Street analysts said would help further steer corporate governance away from family control.

title: Can Billionaire Paul Singer Save Constellation Brands (STZ) Stock?
text: Alcoholic beverage marketer Constellation Brands (NYSE: STZ ) is in the news today, and STZ stock is climbing about 4.5% after the company announced an agreement with activist investor Elliott Management. Elliott's CEO is the well-respected billionaire investor Paul Singer.

title: Constellation Brands shares move higher on board appointments
text: Constellation Brands (NYSE:STZ) shares moved higher in pre-market trading on Wednesday after it announced appointments to its board of directors and a new partnership with one of its largest investors Elliot Investment Management.  The leading alcohol producer and marketer, whose brands include Corona and Modelo Especial, announced on Tuesday that Mondelēz International CFO Luca Zaramella and AutoZone CFO William T.

title: Constellation Brands will appoint two directors, share information in deal with Elliott
text: Corona parent Constellation Brands Inc. STZ, -0.09% on Tuesday said will appoint two new independent directors to its board and share more information with Elliott Investment Management as part of agreements struck between the alcoholic beverage company and the investment firm. Shares were up 3% after hours on Tuesday.

title: Constellation Brands Announces Governance Enhancements, Elects Two New Independent Directors
text: Luca Zaramella, CFO of Mondelēz International, and William T. Giles, Former CFO of AutoZone, to Join the Company's Board of Directors

title: 5 Stocks to Watch as the Alcohol Industry Trends Turn Unfavorable
text: The Beverages - Alcohol industry has been in trouble lately due to elevated input and packaging costs, supply-chain disruptions, and higher marketing expenses. Players like STZ, BF.B, TAP, SAM and NAPA are likely to capitalize on persistent innovation, premiumization and digital endeavors.

title: Modelo named top-selling beer in US for second consecutive month
text: Modelo Especial is the top-selling beer in the U.S. in terms of sales dollars in June. It marks the second month in a row that the Mexican lager has held this spot.

title: Modelo tops Bud Light in sales for the second month in a row
text: Mexican-made Modelo Especial is the top-selling beer in the United States for the second straight month, once again snatching the crown from Bud Light.

title: Should You Buy This Blue Chip Stock for Dividend Growth?
text: Constellation Brands' product portfolio led net sales and earnings higher in its fiscal first quarter. The dividend is well positioned for future growth.

title: Constellation Brands Announces Retirement of Rob Sands From Role as Chair of the Company's Board of Directors
text: VICTOR, N.Y., July 06, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Constellation Brands, Inc. (NYSE: STZ), a leading beverage alcohol company, today announced that Rob Sands will retire from his role as Chair of Constellation's Board of Directors and will not stand for re-election as Board Chair following the company's Annual Meeting of Stockholders on July 18, 2023. Sands will continue in his capacity as a Board member for the company.

title: Constellation Brands earnings reaction “mixed” as beer depletions bar raised
text: Positive commentary from Constellation Brands (NYSE:STZ), Inc CEO Bill Newlands in late May raised the bar on its beer depletions (number of cases distributors sold to retailers) ahead of the company's first quarter fiscal 2024 financial results on June 30, UBS analysts wrote in a note to clients. They noted Constellation's 1Q margins came in better than expected and the company delivered a “solid” earnings beat, although its beer depletions of 5.5% plus came in slightly below Visible Alpha consensus of 5.6% plus and marginally below buy side expectations.

title: Gurus Are Celebrating Freedom With These 5 Consumer Defensive Stocks
text: Ahead of Independence Day in the United States, consumers are preparing to celebrate with cookouts and fireworks displays.

title: Constellation Brands can get beer margins back to 40% without raising prices, analyst says
text: Constellation Brands Inc. is poised to get beer margins back to 40% without input cost declines or price hikes, according to Roth MKM analyst Bill Kirk.

title: The Fourth of July in 2023: A Celebration of Economic Resilience
text: As Americans prepare to celebrate Independence Day on Jul 4, 2023, upbeat economic indicators, including easing inflation, ebbing recessionary fears and resilient consumers, are likely to add to their merriment.
